name: hologres-uv-compute
description: Hologres UV/PV computation using Dynamic Tables and RoaringBitmap for real-time deduplication at scale. Use for building incremental UV/PV pipelines, RoaringBitmap-based user deduplication, flexible time-range UV aggregation, and text-to-int UID encoding for bitmap compatibility. Triggers: "hologres uv", "hologres pv", "roaringbitmap", "rb_build_agg", "rb_or_agg", "去重", "UV计算", "用户去重", "bitmap去重", "实时UV", "hg_id_encoding"
